checks.description: After applying normal finite inputs, the output 'z' must become a non-X 32-bit IEEE-754 value representing the product, observed within a conservative observation window.
checks.pass_condition: z is not X or Z and corresponds to the mathematically correct product of inputs a and b within IEEE‑754 rounding rules; no X propagation is observed.
checks.trigger_condition: When inputs a and b are driven with normal finite values after reset.
